query: ขอข้อมูลเกี่ยวกับการแสดงบุนรากุที่โอซาก้า
reasoning: Tool was called without keyword='文楽' filter, returning 183 unfiltered records. RULE B: single root cause is missing keyword filter; worst-affected dim is intent_understanding (3). The cross_program_advisory block does surface 国立文楽劇場 (Osaka, Q1191541) as the canonical Bunraku venue and suggests get_traditional_arts(keyword='文楽') as the correct follow-up tool, which partially rescues usefulness. Thai lang param was correctly passed so no RULE D language penalty. No featured_cluster present so RULE E does not apply. Osaka location constraint also ignored but subsumed under same root cause (RULE B).
missing_data: Filtered Bunraku records (get_traditional_arts with keyword='文楽' or '文楽' + location=Osaka). Actual performance schedule / dates for 国立文楽劇場. Thai-language descriptions of the art form and venue access info.
improvement_hint: Intent classifier should detect Thai keyword 'บุนรากุ' and auto-apply keyword='文楽' before dispatch. The advisory block already lists 'บุนรากุ' in intent_keywords — wire that mapping so the tool self-routes to the filtered call rather than returning 183 unfiltered records.
